title: Cork and Balls
description: Remodels Wynncraft's Corkian Amplifiers, Simulators and Insulators
body: # 📖 About This resource pack retextures Corkian Augments on the Wynncraft server to 3D models. ## Required/recommended mods - Optifine: Required for custom item textures and emissive textures when using forge. - CIT Resewn: Required for custom item textures when using fabric. # 📜 Terms of use ## You may: - Use this resource pack in YouTube videos or similar content creation. - Please remember to credit me if this is the case. - Alter this resource pack for private use. ## You may NOT: - Claim ownership over this resource pack or any of its assets. - Redistribute this resource pack or any of its assets, edited or not, without my permission. ## 🌐 My other projects - Teyvat Weapon Collection - Annihilating Armory - Ray's 3D Mace
